items.claim: Delgado has sufficient takedown defense to keep the fight standing against Bashy.
items.quote: I think he's shown good enough takedown defense to keep the fight on the feet.

items.claim: Delgado is a superior striker compared to Bashy.
items.quote: I think as long as the fight is on the feet, he is a much better striker than Bashy.

items.claim: Bashy's short stature provides an advantage for closing distance to secure takedowns.
items.quote: Bashi's 5'6, I think that that does give him some advantages to closing the distance to get in on the hips to get the takedowns.

items.claim: Bashy's striking performance at the UFC level has been poor.
items.quote: in the moments that we've seen Bashie strike on the regional scene and especially now at the UFC level, it didn't look good.

items.claim: Delgado's reach and volume striking will be sufficient to defeat Bashy.
items.quote: Delgado with a 74 in reach, a 5'11 frame, with the volume that he can output, the fun striking style that he has, I think it's going to be enough to go out there and beat Bashy.

items.claim: Montes is not a high-level striker.
items.quote: I don't think that Montesa is that good at striking.

items.claim: McMillan is a flawed striker who does not throw straight punches correctly.
items.quote: McMillan I do think is actually quite flawed as a striker... he doesn't really throw like his straight punches very straight.
